assertionResults.title: Source runtime enqueues outbound Onboard envelope
assertionResults.reason: The executed specs did not directly assert drain_outbound_events payload contents for an outbound Onboard envelope.

assertionResults.title: Relay publish actually reaches configured relays
assertionResults.reason: The executed specs did not directly capture per-relay publish/OK frame evidence for configured relay fan-out.

assertionResults.title: Requester device completes handshake end-to-end
assertionResults.reason: onboard-sponsorship.spec.ts passed and explicitly asserts sponsor→requester handshake completion with adopted profile bound to the source group public key.

assertionResults.title: Source dashboard peer list updates with the new member
assertionResults.reason: The executed specs did not directly assert source dashboard peer-list row rendering/persistence for the newly onboarded member.

assertionResults.title: Group threshold/member count reflects the update accurately
assertionResults.reason: The executed specs did not directly assert Settings > Group Profile threshold text/date UI behavior required by this assertion.

assertionResults.title: ONBOARD event-log entry on both sides
assertionResults.reason: onboard-sponsorship.spec.ts passed and explicitly verifies ONBOARD-tagged runtime event-log entries on both sponsor and requester contexts.

assertionResults.title: Wrong or expired password fails cleanly
assertionResults.reason: None of the executed specs exercised wrong-password or expired-package failure paths for onboarding.
assertionResults.commandEvidence: Ran only onboard-sponsorship.spec.ts, rotate-keyset-live-sign.spec.ts, and policy-denial-allow-once-retry.spec.ts

assertionResults.title: Two simultaneous onboards remain isolated
assertionResults.reason: None of the executed specs drove two concurrent onboarding ceremonies across three contexts.
assertionResults.commandEvidence: Ran only onboard-sponsorship.spec.ts, rotate-keyset-live-sign.spec.ts, and policy-denial-allow-once-retry.spec.ts

assertionResults.title: Sponsor can cancel an in-flight onboard
assertionResults.reason: None of the executed specs exercised sponsor-side cancel flow and post-cancel drain verification.
assertionResults.commandEvidence: Ran only onboard-sponsorship.spec.ts, rotate-keyset-live-sign.spec.ts, and policy-denial-allow-once-retry.spec.ts

assertionResults.title: Real-relay e2e across two agent-browser contexts
assertionResults.reason: The executed harnesses used local ws://127.0.0.1:8194 relay and did not run the public-relay + camera-injection flow required by this assertion.

assertionResults.title: Duplicate device label handling
assertionResults.reason: None of the executed specs tested duplicate-label validation/disambiguation behavior in sponsor flow.
assertionResults.commandEvidence: Ran only onboard-sponsorship.spec.ts, rotate-keyset-live-sign.spec.ts, and policy-denial-allow-once-retry.spec.ts

assertionResults.title: Threshold/roster limits enforced on sponsor flow
assertionResults.reason: None of the executed specs attempted over-capacity onboarding (exhausted share slots) and resulting error handling.
assertionResults.commandEvidence: Ran only onboard-sponsorship.spec.ts, rotate-keyset-live-sign.spec.ts, and policy-denial-allow-once-retry.spec.ts

assertionResults.title: Full 2-of-3 bootstrap end-to-end (M7 + M1 + M2)
assertionResults.reason: The executed specs did not run the full A/B/C public-relay bootstrap workflow from create/distribute/onboard through approvals required by this assertion.
assertionResults.commandEvidence: Ran only onboard-sponsorship.spec.ts, rotate-keyset-live-sign.spec.ts, and policy-denial-allow-once-retry.spec.ts

assertionResults.title: Sign fan-out initiated from non-origin peer (M1 + M2)
assertionResults.reason: The executed specs did not directly assert B-initiated sign with A approval-history/UI correlation semantics required by this assertion.
assertionResults.commandEvidence: Ran only onboard-sponsorship.spec.ts, rotate-keyset-live-sign.spec.ts, and policy-denial-allow-once-retry.spec.ts

assertionResults.title: Public relay readiness end-to-end
assertionResults.reason: All executed specs targeted local relay ws://127.0.0.1:8194 and did not validate primal-only public relay readiness/sign completion path.
assertionResults.commandEvidence: Ran only onboard-sponsorship.spec.ts, rotate-keyset-live-sign.spec.ts, and policy-denial-allow-once-retry.spec.ts

assertionResults.title: Idempotent re-onboard safety (M7 + Welcome/Unlock)
assertionResults.reason: None of the executed specs attempted reusing an already-consumed onboarding token in a fresh browser profile.
assertionResults.commandEvidence: Ran only onboard-sponsorship.spec.ts, rotate-keyset-live-sign.spec.ts, and policy-denial-allow-once-retry.spec.ts

assertionResults.title: End-to-end happy path smoke (meta)
assertionResults.reason: The required chained meta flow (001→002→003→015→016) was not executed as one continuous scripted session by the assigned command set.
assertionResults.commandEvidence: Ran only onboard-sponsorship.spec.ts, rotate-keyset-live-sign.spec.ts, and policy-denial-allow-once-retry.spec.ts

assertionResults.title: Rotate Keyset with live sign (Rotate Keyset + M1 + M2 + M7)
assertionResults.reason: rotate-keyset-live-sign.spec.ts validated key rotate + sign-success/old-share-failure, but did not directly assert the full cross-contract flow details (B-initiated sign with approval UI/event-log/indexeddb checks) required by VAL-CROSS-008.

frictions.description: One required command (`policy-denial-allow-once-retry.spec.ts`) validates VAL-CROSS-003 semantics, which are outside this assignment's assertion list, so it did not contribute direct evidence for assigned assertions.
frictions.resolution: Recorded as executed evidence with exit code 0 and left non-overlapping assigned assertions as blocked per instruction.

blockers.description: Most assigned assertions require behaviors not directly asserted by the three mandated spec runs (e.g., public relay/camera paths, concurrent onboard isolation, cancel flow, duplicate-label and roster-limit checks, cross-flow meta chaining).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Executed all three mandated specs serially exactly as assigned and mapped coverage strictly to directly asserted behaviors.
